mapper.sql: id, imp_date, supplier_code, invoice_id, invoice_no, order_no, model_no, quantity, price, amount, amount_adjust, price_rmb, amount_rmb, product_name_en, weight, prod_country, imp_type, customs_fee, vat_fee, trans_fee, other_fee, price_total, amount_total, remark, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, order_type, currency, status, nonCommercial, excise_tax, oversea_invoice_no, product_name, ecode
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_po_invoice_detail
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_po_invoice_detail (id, imp_date, supplier_code, invoice_id, invoice_no, order_no, model_no, quantity, price, amount, amount_adjust, price_rmb, amount_rmb, product_name_en, weight, prod_country, imp_type, customs_fee, vat_fee, trans_fee, other_fee, price_total, amount_total, remark, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, order_type, currency, status, nonCommercial, excise_tax, oversea_invoice_no, product_name, ecode ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{impDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountAdjust,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{priceRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{productNameEn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{prodCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{impType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{priceTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{noncommercial,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{exciseTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{overseaInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into dbo.ops_po_invoice_detail
id,
imp_date,
supplier_code,
invoice_id,
invoice_no,
order_no,
model_no,
quantity,
price,
amount,
amount_adjust,
price_rmb,
amount_rmb,
product_name_en,
weight,
prod_country,
imp_type,
customs_fee,
vat_fee,
trans_fee,
other_fee,
price_total,
amount_total,
remark,
create_time,
update_time,
create_user,
update_user,
order_type,
currency,
status,
nonCommercial,
excise_tax,
oversea_invoice_no,
product_name,
ecode,

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_po_invoice_detail
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
imp_date = #{record.impDate,jdbcType=DATE},
supplier_code = #{record.supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount = #{record.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount_adjust = #{record.amountAdjust,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
price_rmb = #{record.priceRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount_rmb = #{record.amountRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
product_name_en = #{record.productNameEn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
prod_country = #{record.prodCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
imp_type = #{record.impType,jdbcType=CHAR},
customs_fee = #{record.customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
vat_fee = #{record.vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
trans_fee = #{record.transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
other_fee = #{record.otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
price_total = #{record.priceTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount_total = #{record.amountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
currency = #{record.currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
nonCommercial = #{record.noncommercial,jdbcType=CHAR},
excise_tax = #{record.exciseTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
oversea_invoice_no = #{record.overseaInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_name = #{record.productName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ecode = #{record.ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_po_invoice_detail set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, imp_date = #{record.impDate,jdbcType=DATE}, supplier_code = #{record.supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount = #{record.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_adjust = #{record.amountAdjust,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, price_rmb = #{record.priceRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_rmb = #{record.amountRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, product_name_en = #{record.productNameEn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, prod_country = #{record.prodCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, imp_type = #{record.impType,jdbcType=CHAR}, customs_fee = #{record.customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, vat_fee = #{record.vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, trans_fee = #{record.transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, other_fee = #{record.otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, price_total = #{record.priceTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_total = #{record.amountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, currency = #{record.currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, nonCommercial = #{record.noncommercial,jdbcType=CHAR}, excise_tax = #{record.exciseTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, oversea_invoice_no = #{record.overseaInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_name = #{record.productName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ecode = #{record.ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_po_invoice_detail
imp_date = #{impDate,jdbcType=DATE},
supplier_code = #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount_adjust = #{amountAdjust,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
price_rmb = #{priceRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount_rmb = #{amountRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
product_name_en = #{productNameEn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
prod_country = #{prodCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
imp_type = #{impType,jdbcType=CHAR},
customs_fee = #{customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
vat_fee = #{vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
trans_fee = #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
other_fee = #{otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
price_total = #{priceTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount_total = #{amountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
currency = #{currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
nonCommercial = #{noncommercial,jdbcType=CHAR},
excise_tax = #{exciseTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
oversea_invoice_no = #{overseaInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_name = #{productName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ecode = #{ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_po_invoice_detail set imp_date = #{impDate,jdbcType=DATE}, supplier_code = #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_adjust = #{amountAdjust,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, price_rmb = #{priceRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_rmb = #{amountRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, product_name_en = #{productNameEn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, prod_country = #{prodCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, imp_type = #{impType,jdbcType=CHAR}, customs_fee = #{customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, vat_fee = #{vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, trans_fee = #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, other_fee = #{otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, price_total = #{priceTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_total = #{amountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, currency = #{currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, nonCommercial = #{noncommercial,jdbcType=CHAR}, excise_tax = #{exciseTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, oversea_invoice_no = #{overseaInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_name = #{productName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ecode = #{ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
